description: AI research company and creator of ChatGPT, GPT-4, DALL-E, and Sora. Microsoft is a major strategic investor ($13B+).

proxy_rationale.MSFT: Microsoft holds $13B+ stake and integrates OpenAI into Azure/Copilot — primary proxy
proxy_rationale.NVDA: GPU supplier for AI training; NVIDIA revenue tied to AI model training demand

key_signals: Conversion from capped-profit to for-profit structure completion
notes: Corporate restructuring from capped-profit LLC to for-profit C-corp required before IPO. Watch for Delaware incorporation and SEC registration statements.
